title: Liberty Holdings Australia Pty Ltd — Regulatory action
investigation_objective: Named in an ASIC media release as the parent of Liberty Infrabuild Limited, a GFG Alliance group company, paying an infringement notice for allegedly failing to lodge an audited financial report by the statutory deadline — a corporate financial-transparency compliance matter.
scope: Received an ASIC infringement notice ($187,800) for alleged late lodgement of an audited financial report, per 25-278MR
